span.p: This interface separates the responsibility for ensuring an EGL context is only\nactive in a single thread at a time.

span.p: Hides the signaling server usage,\nWebRTC negotiation, and data channel usage

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Hides the creation and use (except for WebRTC negotiation) of the GStreamer pipeline,\nframe receiving, and the GMainLoop used by GStreamer and other GLib components.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Hides all OpenXR related code: swapchain acquire, wait, release,\nrendering from decoded frames, and optionally xr*Frame calls
